app.name: nine-snake
app.tagline: A multi-headed AI agent that grows with you
settings.title: Settings
onboarding.step1.title: Welcome to nine-snake
onboarding.step1.body: A multi-headed AI assistant that grows with you. This guide will help you complete the initial setup.
onboarding.step2.title: Configure Ollama
onboarding.step2.body: nine-snake uses the local Ollama daemon for LLM capabilities. Please ensure Ollama is running.
onboarding.step3.title: Start using nine-snake
onboarding.step3.body: Setup complete! Explore the 8-layer memory system, three-mode workspace, and Swarm multi-agent collaboration.
onboarding.ollamaHint: Make sure Ollama is running: execute 'ollama serve' or download from ollama.com
ollama.banner.title: Ollama is not running
ollama.banner.body: nine-snake needs the local Ollama daemon to talk to your model.
ollama.timeout.title: Request timed out
command.title: Command palette
error.network.title: Can't reach the model
error.network.hint: Is Ollama running on the configured URL?
error.storage.title: Local storage error
error.storage.hint: Check disk space and the data directory permissions.
error.validation.title: Invalid input
error.permission.title: Action not allowed
error.permission.hint: Review the workspace root and shell whitelist.
error.notfound.title: Not found
error.internal.title: Internal error
error.internal.hint: The full error has been written to the log.
memoryMap.title: Memory Map
